emails.subject: Emmisions Contact List
emails.body: Attached is the list of the counterparties that EOL wants to approve for emissions auction trading. Please let me know ASAP if there are any counterparties on this list that should not be allowed to trade emissions auctions. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/06/2000 05:40 PM Eric Saibi@ENRON 03/06/2000 04:23 PM
